segments.text: Then the Spirit lifted me up and brought me to the gate of the house of the Lord that faces east. There at the entrance of the gate were twenty-five men, and I saw among them Jaazaniah son of Azzur and Pelatiah son of Benaiah, leaders of the people.
The Lord said to me,
Son of man, these are the men who are plotting evil and giving wicked advice in this city.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Haven't our houses been recently rebuilt? This city is a pot, and we are the meat in it.
segments.speaker: Leaders of Israel

segments.text: Therefore prophesy against them; prophesy, son of man.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then the Spirit of the Lord came on me, and he told me to say:
This is what the Lord says: That is what you are saying, you leaders in Israel, but I know what is going through your mind.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: You have killed many people in this city and filled its streets with the dead.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The bodies you have thrown there are the meat and this city is the pot, but I will drive you out of it.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: You fear the sword, and the sword is what I will bring against you, declares the Sovereign Lord.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will drive you out of the city and deliver you into the hands of foreigners and inflict punishment on you.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: You will fall by the sword, and I will execute judgment on you at the borders of Israel. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: This city will not be a pot for you, nor will you be the meat in it; I will execute judgment on you at the borders of Israel.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: And you will know that I am the Lord, for you have not followed my decrees or kept my laws but have conformed to the standards of the nations around you.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Now as I was prophesying, Pelatiah son of Benaiah died.
Alas, Sovereign Lord! Will you completely destroy the remnant of Israel?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: The word of the Lord came to me:
Son of man, the people of Jerusalem have said of your fellow exiles and all the other Israelites, 'They are far away from the Lord; this land was given to us as our possession.'
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Although I sent them far away among the nations and scattered them among the countries, yet for a little while I have been a sanctuary for them in the countries where they have gone.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will gather you from the nations and bring you back from the countries where you have been scattered, and I will give you back the land of Israel again.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: They will return to it and remove all its vile images and detestable idols.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will give them an undivided heart and put a new spirit in them; I will remove from them their heart of stone and give them a heart of flesh.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Then they will follow my decrees and be careful to keep my laws. They will be my people, and I will be their God.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: But as for those whose hearts are devoted to their vile images and detestable idols, I will bring down on their own heads what they have done, declares the Sovereign Lord.
segments.speaker: The Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Then the cherubim, with the wheels beside them, spread their wings, and the glory of the God of Israel was above them.
The glory of the Lord went up from within the city and stopped above the mountain east of it.
The Spirit lifted me up and brought me to the exiles in Babylonia in the vision given by the Spirit of God. Then the vision I had seen went up from me,
and I told the exiles everything the Lord had shown me.
